title: Get rid of dangling whitespace in markdown files
body: Get rid of dangling whitespace in markdown files, and add a quick validation check to error out if we try to add any new ones.

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat it doesn't break anything here, but it's something that `git-validation` would be doing for us if its `$GIT_CHECK_EXCLUDE` feature didn't depend on a newer version of git than we have by default on EL7.  (More on that at https://github.com/vbatts/git-validation/issues/37.)
Travis just refuses to work. Force merging.
